name: Venus Medtech (Hangzhou) Inc.
summary: Venus Medtech (Hangzhou) Inc. develops and sells transcatheter heart valve medical devices in Mainland China and internationally. The company's products include VenusA-Valve, a transcatheter aortic heart valve replacement (TAVR) product to treat severe aortic stenosis; VenusP-Valve is a transcatheter pulmonary valve system to treat the dysfunction of right ventricular outflow tract; V8/TAV8 balloon aortic valvuloplasty catheter systems; and TriGUARD3, a cerebral embolic protection device for minimizing the risk of cerebral damage during TAVR and other structural heart procedures. It also develops VenusA-Plus and VenusA-Pilot, which are TAVR product candidates; and transcatheter mitral and tricuspid valve replacement products. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
